mapper.sql: id, model_code, model_name, model_type, model_family, version, display_name, tagline, description, logo_url, cover_url, tags_json, use_cases_json, capabilities_json, context_window, max_output_tokens, input_modalities_json, output_modalities_json, languages_json, default_params_json, param_schema_json, safety_policy_json, visibility, publish_status, status, sort_order, featured, owner_user_id, owner_team, quality_level, latency_level, cost_level, pricing_summary, remark, created_at, updated_at

pm.id, pm.logical_model_id, lm.model_code AS logical_model_code, lm.model_name AS logical_model_name, pm.provider_id, p.name AS provider_name, pm.model_id, m.model_code, m.name AS model_name, pm.provider_model_name, pm.status, pm.priority, pm.created_at, pm.updated_at
mapper.select:
select from logical_models
and ( model_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or model_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or display_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or model_family like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by featured desc, sort_order asc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into logical_models( model_code, model_name, model_type, model_family, version, display_name, tagline, description, logo_url, cover_url, tags_json, use_cases_json, capabilities_json, context_window, max_output_tokens, input_modalities_json, output_modalities_json, languages_json, default_params_json, param_schema_json, safety_policy_json, visibility, publish_status, status, sort_order, featured, owner_user_id, owner_team, quality_level, latency_level, cost_level, pricing_summary, remark ) values ( #{modelCode}, #{modelName}, #{modelType}, #{modelFamily}, #{version}, #{displayName}, #{tagline}, #{description}, #{logoUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{tagsJson}, #{useCasesJson}, #{capabilitiesJson}, #{contextWindow}, #{maxOutputTokens}, #{inputModalitiesJson}, #{outputModalitiesJson}, #{languagesJson}, #{defaultParamsJson}, #{paramSchemaJson}, #{safetyPolicyJson}, #{visibility}, #{publishStatus}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{featured}, #{ownerUserId}, #{ownerTeam}, #{qualityLevel}, #{latencyLevel}, #{costLevel}, #{pricingSummary}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update logical_models set model_code = #{modelCode}, model_name = #{modelName}, model_type = #{modelType}, model_family = #{modelFamily}, version = #{version}, display_name = #{displayName}, tagline = #{tagline}, description = #{description}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, use_cases_json = #{useCasesJson}, capabilities_json = #{capabilitiesJson}, context_window = #{contextWindow}, max_output_tokens = #{maxOutputTokens}, input_modalities_json = #{inputModalitiesJson}, output_modalities_json = #{outputModalitiesJson}, languages_json = #{languagesJson}, default_params_json = #{defaultParamsJson}, param_schema_json = #{paramSchemaJson}, safety_policy_json = #{safetyPolicyJson}, visibility = #{visibility}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, featured = #{featured}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, owner_team = #{ownerTeam}, quality_level = #{qualityLevel}, latency_level = #{latencyLevel}, cost_level = #{costLevel}, pricing_summary = #{pricingSummary}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from provider_model_mappings pm left join logical_models lm on pm.logical_model_id = lm.id left join providers p on pm.provider_id = p.id left join models m on pm.model_id = m.id where pm.logical_model_id = #{logicalModelId} order by pm.priority asc, pm.id asc

select from provider_model_mappings pm left join logical_models lm on pm.logical_model_id = lm.id left join providers p on pm.provider_id = p.id left join models m on pm.model_id = m.id where pm.model_id = #{modelId} order by pm.priority asc, pm.id asc

select from provider_model_mappings pm left join logical_models lm on pm.logical_model_id = lm.id left join providers p on pm.provider_id = p.id left join models m on pm.model_id = m.id where pm.id = #{id}
